response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate due to his extensive experience in building high-performance, low-latency systems and his long-term, hands-on involvement with geospatial data platforms through his GISCollective project. His work at Dunnhumby with Dlang on high-throughput microservices is a strong proxy for the performance requirements of the role. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his deep expertise in Dlang, a similar systems language, and his demonstrated ability to work across a wide range of technologies suggest he could quickly become proficient in modern C++ or Rust.
strengths: Deep, long-term experience building and maintaining a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience with low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems in a data integration context.
Strong systems programming background with Dlang, demonstrating capability for performance-critical work.
concerns: Primary required skills in modern C++ or Rust are not demonstrated through recent commercial experience.
The most relevant C++ experience listed is from 2015, which may not reflect modern practices.
Recent work history is predominantly in TypeScript/Node.js, differing from the core technologies of this role.
